# R5 — Suppression UI & Reading Screen Wiring

> **Milestone**: M1.4 | **Epic**: E1.4.4 | **Feature**: F1.4.4.2
> **Task**: T1.4.4.2.1.1
> **Depends on**: R3 (artifact engine — `ArtifactClassifier`, `ArtifactRegion`, `ArtifactType`), R4 (mode integration — reading screen already modified)
> **Skills to load**: `riverpod-providers`, `riverpod-codegen-and-hooks`, `flutter-building-layouts`, `flutter-handling-concurrency`

Load shared context: [M1.4 reading polish context](../instructions/m1.4-reading-polish-context.instructions.md)

---

## Task

Create a suppression provider to track which artifact regions the user has marked for skipping, a suppression overlay widget that shows detected artifacts during paused reading, and wire artifact detection into the reading screen. Classification runs in `Isolate.run()` when a document is loaded. Users can long-press regions during pause to toggle suppression.

## Prerequisites — Verify Before Starting

Confirm these files exist (created by R3 and R4). If any are missing, **stop and report**:

- `lib/features/content/services/artifact_classifier.dart` (exports `classifyArtifacts`, `ArtifactRegion`, `ArtifactType`)
- `lib/screens/reading_screen.dart` already has R4 modifications (mode switching, reading ruler)

## Files to Create

### 1. `lib/features/reading/providers/suppression_provider.dart`

```dart
import 'package:riverpod_annotation/riverpod_annotation.dart';
import 'package:runthru/features/content/services/artifact_classifier.dart';

part 'suppression_provider.g.dart';

/// State for artifact suppression — tracks detected regions and user suppressions.
class SuppressionState {
  const SuppressionState({
    this.regions = const [],
    this.suppressedIndices = const {},
  });

  /// Artifact regions detected by the classifier.
  final List<ArtifactRegion> regions;

  /// Set of word indices the user has marked for suppression (skipping).
  final Set<int> suppressedIndices;

  /// Whether a word at [index] should be skipped during reading.
  bool isSuppressed(int index) => suppressedIndices.contains(index);

  /// Create a copy with modified fields.
  SuppressionState copyWith({
    List<ArtifactRegion>? regions,
    Set<int>? suppressedIndices,
  }) {
    return SuppressionState(
      regions: regions ?? this.regions,
      suppressedIndices: suppressedIndices ?? this.suppressedIndices,
    );
  }
}

/// Manages artifact detection results and user suppression toggles.
/// Auto-disposed when the reading screen unmounts.
@riverpod
class SuppressionNotifier extends _$SuppressionNotifier {
  @override
  SuppressionState build() => const SuppressionState();

  /// Set detected artifact regions (called after classification completes).
  void setRegions(List<ArtifactRegion> regions) {
    state = state.copyWith(regions: regions);
  }

  /// Toggle suppression on all words in a region.
  void toggleRegion(ArtifactRegion region) {
    final indices = Set<int>.from(state.suppressedIndices);
    final regionIndices = List.generate(
      region.length,
      (i) => region.startIndex + i,
    );

    // If any word in the region is already suppressed, unsuppress all
    if (regionIndices.any(indices.contains)) {
      indices.removeAll(regionIndices);
    } else {
      indices.addAll(regionIndices);
    }

    state = state.copyWith(suppressedIndices: indices);
  }

  /// Clear all suppressions (e.g., when loading a new document).
  void clear() {
    state = const SuppressionState();
  }
}
```

**After creating this file, run `dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs`.**

### 2. `lib/features/reading/widgets/suppression_overlay.dart`

```dart
/// Overlay that shows detected artifact regions during paused reading.
///
/// Users can tap a region to toggle suppression (skip during reading).
/// Only visible when reading is paused — never during active RSVP.
class SuppressionOverlay extends StatelessWidget {
  const SuppressionOverlay({
    super.key,
    required this.isPaused,
    required this.words,
    required this.regions,
    required this.suppressedIndices,
    required this.onToggleRegion,
  });

  /// Whether reading is currently paused.
  final bool isPaused;

  /// The word list for preview context.
  final List<String> words;

  /// Detected artifact regions from the classifier.
  final List<ArtifactRegion> regions;

  /// Set of word indices currently marked for suppression.
  final Set<int> suppressedIndices;

  /// Callback when user toggles suppression on a region.
  final void Function(ArtifactRegion region) onToggleRegion;
}
```

**Design requirements:**

1. If `!isPaused` or `regions.isEmpty`, return `SizedBox.shrink()`
2. Render as a scrollable bottom panel (`Align(alignment: Alignment.bottomCenter)`)
3. Background: `RunThruTokens.stageBase` with 95% opacity
4. For each region, show a row:

| Icon | Type Label | Preview | Action |
|------|-----------|---------|--------|
| `Icons.table_chart` | "Table" | First ~5 words + "…" | "Skip" / "Include" |
| `Icons.code` | "Code" | First ~5 words + "…" | "Skip" / "Include" |
| `Icons.image` | "Caption" | First ~5 words + "…" | "Skip" / "Include" |
| `Icons.bookmark` | "Page #" | The word | "Skip" / "Include" |
| `Icons.format_quote` | "Reference" | The word(s) | "Skip" / "Include" |

5. **Every badge has icon + text label** (not color-only — Rule 11)
6. Action button toggles between "Skip" (with `Icons.visibility_off`) and "Include" (with `Icons.visibility`)
7. Check if region is suppressed: `region indices ∩ suppressedIndices ≠ ∅`
8. `onTap`: call `onToggleRegion(region)`
9. Touch targets ≥ 48dp on all interactive elements
10. `Semantics` on each row: `'Detected {type}: {preview}. Tap to {skip|include}.'`
11. Text: `RunThruTypography.caption`
12. Max panel height: 40% of viewport, scrollable if more regions

## Files to Modify

### 3. `lib/screens/reading_screen.dart`

**Add imports:**
```dart
import 'dart:isolate';
import 'package:runthru/features/content/services/artifact_classifier.dart';
import 'package:runthru/features/reading/providers/suppression_provider.dart';
import 'package:runthru/features/reading/widgets/suppression_overlay.dart';
```

**Run classification when document loads — in the document loading flow:**

After `_words` is populated (in `_loadDocument()` or wherever words are set), trigger classification in an isolate:

```dart
// Run artifact classification in isolate (heavy computation off main thread)
final wordsCopy = List<String>.unmodifiable(_words);
final regions = await Isolate.run(() => classifyArtifacts(wordsCopy));
if (mounted) {
  ref.read(suppressionNotifierProvider.notifier).setRegions(regions);
}
```

**Add suppression overlay to `_buildContent()` Stack — after the reading ruler:**

```dart
// Suppression overlay — shows during pause only
Consumer(
  builder: (context, ref, _) {
    final suppression = ref.watch(suppressionNotifierProvider);
    return SuppressionOverlay(
      isPaused: !timerState.isPlaying && _words.isNotEmpty,
      words: _words,
      regions: suppression.regions,
      suppressedIndices: suppression.suppressedIndices,
      onToggleRegion: (region) {
        ref.read(suppressionNotifierProvider.notifier).toggleRegion(region);
      },
    );
  },
),
```

**Clear suppression state when loading a new document:**

In `_loadDocument()` or wherever a new document is set:
```dart
ref.read(suppressionNotifierProvider.notifier).clear();
```

---

## What NOT to Do

- Do NOT modify `WordTimerNotifier` — suppression affects display, not timer logic
- Do NOT modify `lib/core/orp.dart`, `lib/three_d/`, or gesture code
- Do NOT modify `artifact_classifier.dart` — use it as-is from R3
- Do NOT run classification on the main thread — always use `Isolate.run()`
- Do NOT persist suppression state in `AppConfig` — it's per-session
- Do NOT use raw `Color(0xFF...)` or raw `TextStyle()`
- Do NOT use color-only indicators — every badge needs icon + label
- Do NOT forget to run `build_runner` after creating the provider
- Do NOT show the overlay during active reading — only when paused

---

## Verification

```powershell
dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
dart analyze lib/features/reading/providers/suppression_provider.dart lib/features/reading/widgets/suppression_overlay.dart lib/screens/reading_screen.dart
flutter test
```

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `SuppressionState` tracks `regions` and `suppressedIndices`
- [ ] `SuppressionNotifier` has `setRegions()`, `toggleRegion()`, `clear()` methods
- [ ] `.g.dart` file generated by build_runner
- [ ] `SuppressionOverlay` shows detected regions only when paused
- [ ] Each region has icon + type label + preview + toggle button (not color-only)
- [ ] Toggle button switches between "Skip" and "Include" with appropriate icons
- [ ] Touch targets ≥ 48dp on all interactive elements
- [ ] `Semantics` labels on all interactive elements
- [ ] Classification runs in `Isolate.run()` — not on main thread
- [ ] Classification triggered when document words are loaded
- [ ] Suppression state cleared when loading a new document
- [ ] Panel scrollable when many regions detected
- [ ] Empty regions → no overlay shown (no empty state)
- [ ] All colors from `RunThruTokens`, all text from `RunThruTypography`
- [ ] All public symbols have dartdoc comments
- [ ] `dart analyze` — zero issues
- [ ] `flutter test` — no new failures

- `artifact_classifier.dart` doesn't exist or exports different types than expected
- `reading_screen.dart` has changed significantly from R4 — describe what you see
- `Isolate.run` is not available (minimum Dart SDK) — describe the constraint

List the ambiguities instead of guessing.
